message:
refactor(plan): Consolidate PlanCost into extractor module, widen to u64

Moves the canonical PlanCost definition from analysis.rs to extractor.rs,
eliminating the duplicate struct. Analysis module now imports PlanCost
from the parent (extractor) module.

Key changes:
- PlanCost fields widened from u32 to u64 to prevent overflow on large
  plan DAGs (e-graphs with >4B nodes are reachable in pathological cases)
- Removed PlanCost::UNKNOWN sentinel (callers should use Option<PlanCost>)
- Updated all cost aggregation helpers (obligation_pressure, sum_costs,
  max_cost, min_cost) from u32 to u64
- Added u64::from() casts for BudgetEffect::min_polls (still u32 internally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
